name: Roseanna Vitro
abstract: Roseanna Elizabeth Vitro (born February 28, 1951) is a jazz singer and teacher from Arkansas.

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: this singer Roseanna Vitro, and it was like, so we started talking... We’re going on the road soon, give her your number.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022
